amount.description: Defined pay amount per period. Does not include bonus, commission or similar incentive-based income.

period.description:
Payment interval that specifically corresponds to the base pay `amount`.
- `hourly`
- `daily`
- `weekly`
- `biweekly` — every two weeks
- `semimonthly` — twice a month
- `monthly`
- `annual`
- `salary` — only when explicitly mentioned and no other pay period information is present
